scripts.rulesync:skills: bunx rulesync install --mode rulesync && bun scripts/patch-rulesync-skill-frontmatter.ts && bunx rulesync generate --targets codexcli --features skills
scripts.rulesync:skills:update: bunx rulesync install --mode rulesync --update && bun scripts/patch-rulesync-skill-frontmatter.ts && bunx rulesync generate --targets codexcli --features skills
